# Kleene squaring vs Warshall closure benchmark
# Build: Release recommended. ratio = (cc + kleene) / warshall (lower is better for Kleene).
# k_trunc uses ceil(log2(n_max)); k_full uses ceil(log2(M)).
# verify_* columns: 1 when Kleene closure matches Warshall on that graph.

family,M,edges,density,n_max,k_trunc,k_full,verify_trunc,verify_full,cc_p50_us,warshall_p50_us,kleene_trunc_p50_us,kleene_full_p50_us,ratio_trunc,ratio_full,warshall_p10_us,warshall_p90_us,kleene_trunc_p10_us,kleene_trunc_p90_us
